data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, West Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Western Sarawak and Eastern Sabah, Lahad Datu until 5:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor Barat, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak Barat dan Sabah Timur, Lahad Datu sehingga 5:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Reef North, southern part of Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 5:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Reef North, selatan Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 5:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ; and  Kedah  (Langkawi) until 3:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ; dan  Kedah  (Langkawi) sehingga 3:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Pahang  (Lipis, Jerantut and Kuantan) until 4:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Pahang  (Lipis, Jerantut dan Kuantan) sehingga 4:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Typhoon Advisory (MEKKHALA)                  Time of Observation:  23:00, 23 June 2026                  Location:  Latitude 19.8 North and Longitude 124.5 East                  Movement:  North 7 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  157 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 383 km Northeast of Tuguegarao City, Philippines.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1658 km Northeast of Kudat, Sabah.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Taufan (MEKKHALA)                  Masa Pencerapan:  23:00, 23 Jun 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 19.8 Utara dan Longitud 124.5 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Utara dengan kelajuan 7 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  157 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 383 km ke Timur Laut Tuguegarao City, Filipina.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1658 km Timur Laut Kudat, Sabah.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
